name: Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited
summary: Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the restaurant operation and food production businesses in the People's Republic of China. The company operates restaurants under the Tang Palace Seafood Restaurant, Tang's Cuisine, Tang Palace, Social Place, Canton Tea Room, Pepper Lunch, and PappaRich brands. It is also involved in intangible asset holding, as well as retail and wholesale trading activities. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated 57 restaurants. Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong
